meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Biohacking Village - Nina Alli  - Keynote
meta.description:
Nina Alli, Executive Director of the Biohacking Village, interviews folks in the biomedical and health industry for their insight and thoughts on where healthcare is and calls to action. They were not informed of the questions, these are real reactions and real talk.

Interviewees:
Vee Schmitt: Patient, Hacker
Yusuf Henriques: Army Veteran, Entrepreneur
Josh O'Connor: Recording Producer, Future Social Worker
Cannibal: Hacker, Maker
Devabhaktuni Srikrishna: Data Scientist
Najla Lindsay: DFIR Scientist, BHV Speaker Ops
Nate DeNicola, MD: Telehealth, Physician
